description: We are seeking individuals with a strong interest and foundational knowledge in AI Chatbot development , who is ready to collaborate closely with our engineers to build a smart, autonomous AI assistant . The ideal candidate will be passionate about AI, natural language processing (NLP), and working in a cross-functional team environment to deliver customer-centric solutions. Key Responsibilities Design and develop intelligent chatbots using platforms like Dialogflow, Microsoft Bot Framework, Rasa, or similar. Integrate chatbot with knowledge base built by collaborating with Engineers to ensure accurate and context-aware responses. Collaborate with Engineers to gather domain knowledge and technical documentation for chatbot training. Train and optimize chatbot models using NLP techniques, intent recognition, and entity extraction. Implement automation workflows to route complex queries to human agents or internal systems. Monitor and improve chatbot performance using analytics and user feedback. Support integration with CRM, ERP, or e-commerce systems for order and inventory inquiries. Stay updated with latest trends in AI, NLP, and conversational AI for continuous improvement. What We’re Looking For Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, or related field . Technical Skills: Experience with AI/ML tools (e.g., Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn). Knowledge of chatbot platforms : Dialogflow, Rasa, Microsoft Bot Framework, or similar. Basic understanding of NLP concepts : Intent recognition, entity extraction, context management. Familiarity with APIs and web integration (REST, JSON, webhooks). Experience with SQL and database management (bonus). Understanding of safety systems or industrial applications (e.g., fire detection, gas monitoring) is a plus. Soft Skills: Strong communication and problem-solving abilities. Collaborative mindset, especially working with engineers and technical teams. Passion for learning and innovation. Ability to work independently and manage small projects. Preferred Qualifications Academic projects or internships involving chatbot development or NLP . Experience in domain-specific knowledge base creation . Familiarity with CRM or ERP systems . Exposure to sales and technical support workflows . What We Offer Opportunity to work in a dynamic, innovative environment . Collaboration with Application Engineers , Sales , and Technical Support teams. Exposure to real-world applications in industrial safety and gas detection. Professional growth and learning opportunities. Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.
